title: FAQ Question Pattern Analysis Workflow
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for faq question pattern analysis workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Sequence the FAQ generation workflow from extracting the concept list through question generation, answer validation, and FAQ index update
Explain how 5-10 candidate questions are generated per concept from learning graph dependencies and question-pattern searches
Distinguish automated steps from human checkpoints such as educator review of questions that fail the quality threshold
Trace the two feedback loops in the diagram: flagged questions routed to educator review and incomplete answers revised and regenerated
